## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, programmatic SEO, and performance updates.](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Planning programmatic SEO for dental job/salary data by location, leveraging Teero's internal data and public sources](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Content performance improving: 17% week-over-week traffic increase, positive impact from Google core update](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Expanding content clusters: dental management, patient-focused, insurance-related, and W-2/1099 topics](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Topics

### Programmatic SEO Strategy for Job/Salary Data

  - [Create location-based pages for dental job/salary info, prioritizing 85 metro areas + suburbs](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Data sources: Teero's internal data, Indeed scraping, public job sites](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Use 20% baseline for temp job premium, adjust per location](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Population threshold (e.g., 50k-90k) to determine which suburbs to include](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [USPS database suggested for city/location data](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

### Content Performance Update

  - [Week 14: Biggest traffic week yet, 17% increase week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Google core update impact: 150 keywords improved, 35 declined](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [8 new pieces published this week, 4 scheduled for next week](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Content Strategy and Topics

  - [Continuing insurance-related content (10-15 articles published so far)](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Expanding W-2 and 1099 topics: taxes, worker's comp, narrower scopes](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Patient-focused and dental management content planned](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [New conversion panels spotted on blog (unintentionally published)](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Need for strategic placement of CTAs throughout articles, not just at the bottom](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Importance of high-intent offers for readers who reach the end of articles](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to wireframe programmatic page layout and data requirements](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Aida to add more insurance-related and granular W-2/1099 topic assignments](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Nate to provide examples of good conversion blocks for inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Implement ability to move conversion panels within articles once available](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Continue refining W-2 article based on Nate's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/vXTmzP9qXzH3zhZfipmxsB2vw9bisVzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
